title: Fundraising Manager
description:
Fundraising (Partnerships & Engagement)

Central Region | Hybrid | Full-time

Role Overview
We’re seeking a results-driven fundraising professional to grow donor partnerships, lead high-impact campaigns, and expand sustainable giving. This role combines strategy, relationship management, and execution, with ownership over fundraising performance and donor engagement.

Key Responsibilities

  • Plan and deliver fundraising campaigns and events to meet revenue targets

  • Manage and grow key donor accounts through structured engagement plans

  • Identify, cultivate, and onboard new donors and partners

  • Drive monthly giving and long-term donor retention

  • Develop donor and volunteer networks to deepen engagement

  • Shape fundraising messaging and appeal strategies

  • Analyze campaign and donor data to optimize results

  • Lead and guide a team supporting fundraising and donor engagement

Requirements

  • Degree-qualified

  • 5+ years of fundraising, partnerships, or donor engagement experience

  • Strong stakeholder management and campaign execution skills

  • Data-driven, proactive, and highly self-motivated

  • Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, target-driven environment

Send your detailed CV (Word format) to enoch.cheong@peopleprofilers.com today!

People Profilers Pte Ltd

Address: 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, Plus Building, Singapore 049705

Contact: +65 6950 9740

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
